notes: Update readiness repair for v9.10.347.128 delivery: version/cache metadata refreshed everywhere, service worker uses a v9.10.347.129 cache name, HTML navigation requests bypass stale cache, and help wording documents the current GPS transportation workflow, concise Ask summaries, and pre-ride route preview.
summary: Update readiness repair, GPS workflow/help clarity, and pre-ride route preview delivery hardening.
label: GPSPreRideRoutePreviewUpdateRepair
whatsNew: Pre-ride route preview remains available after destination selection when prior same-destination GPS observations exist.
Transportation activities use Start once / Finish once; GPS estimates movement, stopped time, stops, distance, and elevation.
Ask Activity is guided to provide a short one-screen summary first, with details only when useful.
fixes: Refreshed version metadata across index.html, all.js, manifest.json, sw.js, reset.html, and version.json.
Updated the service worker to use the v9.10.347.129 cache name and bypass stale cached HTML navigation responses.
Help/known-issues wording now reflects the current GPS transportation and route-preview behavior.
